posts.author: avi.bachar (Avi Bachar)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hi
I am working to implement Monday Dev
and one of the things I am looking for is a ways to have a shared sprint.
we have several scrum team and I do want to have some “space” (not to stick to any know concept like board or folder etc) for each team to manage its own backlog and stories and issues - but as for the sprints that all will be using it should be handled in a single place and all should use the same sprint - not each team will create their own sprints.
